notes: Switzerland are near full strength with only Miro Muheim carrying a minor injury concern and Yakin hinting at a recall for Ruben Vargas; Canada are significantly weakened by the tournament-ending broken leg suffered by key midfielder Ismael Kone, while Alphonso Davies — an unused substitute vs. Qatar — remains a doubt to start and may only slot in depending on fitness.
